hero.subtitle: Custom software, artificial intelligence, and process automation for companies that want to grow without friction.
hero.bio: Systems Engineer (UNICEN). 25+ years building products in production. My thesis was on neural networks applied to CRM — what we now call AI was my research area before the term existed.

services.heading: services
services.title: How can I help you?
services.subtitle: From design to deployment. I work end-to-end or integrate into your team wherever you need me most.

items.title: Software Development
items.subtitle: Web · Mobile · APIs
items.desc: Custom web and mobile applications with modern technologies. From MVP in weeks to scalable multi-tenant platforms.

items.title: AI Solutions
items.subtitle: LLMs · Agents · RAG
items.desc: Real artificial intelligence integration into your business: conversational assistants, automated data analysis, and autonomous agents.

items.title: Process Automation
items.subtitle: n8n · Workflows · APIs
items.desc: Eliminate repetitive manual work. We connect your tools and automate complete flows with n8n and APIs.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.subtitle: Architecture · Strategy · Team
items.desc: Architecture review, stack definition, team onboarding, and support in critical technical decisions.

ai.heading: artificial intelligence
ai.title: AI that actually
ai.desc: No demos, no empty promises. I integrate advanced language models (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) directly into your processes to automate real work and generate measurable value. My university thesis was on neural networks — I've been thinking about how AI can solve business problems for decades.

usecases.title: Conversational assistants
usecases.desc: Chatbots with real knowledge of your business. They answer questions, take orders, qualify leads, and escalate to humans when needed.

usecases.title: RAG over your documents
usecases.desc: Upload your manuals, contracts or reports. AI reads them, understands them, and answers precise questions about them.

usecases.title: Autonomous agents
usecases.desc: Multi-step workflows that think and act: search for information, update systems, send notifications and generate reports on their own.

usecases.title: Analysis and executive summaries
usecases.desc: Endless meetings? AI transcribes, summarizes, detects decisions and agreements, and delivers them structured in seconds.

usecases.title: Classification and scoring
usecases.desc: Leads, tickets, ideas, CVs: AI classifies, prioritizes, and scores them according to your criteria, without manual intervention.

usecases.title: Computer vision
usecases.desc: Image and photo analysis: document reading, product recognition, visual quality control.

automation.heading: automation
automation.title: Automate the work
automation.desc: With n8n and a solid automation architecture, you eliminate repetitive manual work and free your team for what matters.

portfolio.heading: portfolio
portfolio.title: Live projects
portfolio.subtitle: Real products, modern stacks, concrete problems solved. Each one started as an idea.

steps.title: We understand your problem
steps.desc: A 30-minute call to understand what you need, what you have today, and what result you're looking for. No jargon, no selling.

steps.title: Proposal and architecture
steps.desc: I design the technical solution using SDD methodology, define the stack, estimate timelines, and present a clear, actionable phase roadmap.

steps.title: MVP in weeks
steps.desc: We start with the core that delivers real value. In 2–4 weeks you have something functional in the hands of real users.

steps.title: We iterate with data
steps.desc: We measure, adjust, and keep building in short cycles. The product improves with real feedback, not assumptions.

posts.title: SDD: the methodology I use to kick off any project
posts.desc: System Design Document as a communication tool between client, dev, and AI. Why it has worked since 2000.
